PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Continued To Oct-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Adriana Quintero and Richard Romano for and with Darrell Simmons (Petitioner). Anthony Vecino and Jonathan Bass for Darnis Banks (Respondent).

Ms. Quintero stated that a will contest was filed (June 19, 2013) and set for July 24, 2013, and that there is an 850 Petition in related case number PTR-13-296817 The Nelson Banks Trust on calendar for August 19, 2013 and a Petition for Declaratory Relief on calendar for July 22, 2013. The Parties will do private mediation. The Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary was continued to October 28, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 21, 2013. If the Parties determine that the value of the Estate is less than $3,000,000.00, they will contact the Probate Examiner for the Court to issue an order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. All of the above mentioned matters were also continued to October 28, 2013.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
